limitations: TPL's AI exposure is primarily indirect — via a minority equity investment in a data center infrastructure company (Bolt); TPL itself is not building or operating AI infrastructure directly
Data center investment is framed as real estate/land monetization strategy; AI is not the explicit driver named in the investment thesis, though data centers are AI-adjacent
No quantified multi-year capex commitment by TPL beyond the $50M investment; score 4 rather than 5 reflects single disclosed transaction

AI narrative concreteness is limited to named initiatives (data center campuses, water supply rights) with no deployment metrics or revenue results yet disclosed; score 3 reflects named but pre-revenue stage

Risk section mentions AI only in the cybersecurity context (generative/agentic AI as an emerging threat vector) and minority investment risks; no dedicated AI-specific risk category for the data center strategy
